dashboardTitle: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Global Security Desk

risks.title: England and Argentina national anthems drowned out
risks.description: Both England and Argentina's national anthems are drowned out by crowd noise, before the teams kick off their 2026 World Cup semi-final at the Atlanta Stadium.

risks.title: Why everyone hates the FIFA World Cup halftime show
risks.description: The World Cup final comes accompanied by a generational lineup of pop stars – including Madonna and Justin Bieber – but many fans view it as the last straw in a long series of corruption scandals and rule-bending

risks.title: Ex-USMNT star warns of ‘emotional conundrum’ facing Spain should Lionel Messi reach World Cup final

risks.description: Post Malone will be headlining the FIFA World Cup 2026 closing ceremony.He’ll be performing just before the final soccer match takes place at New Jersey’s MetLife Stadium, known for the World Cup as the New York/New Jersey Stadium, on Sunday.
